payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would risk returning outdated information.
payload.decision: Returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query. Filtered mem_old because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: Both memories refer to Sam associated with Goldman; mem_new is treated as the current version while mem_old is linked as superseded.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug decision for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old also matched the query but was excluded because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, correct or delete mem_new and reconsider whether mem_old should become active again.
If both memories represent different Sams or different Goldman entities, split the entities or add disambiguating metadata.
